# zedcloud_cep_profile (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `csr_profile` (Block List, Min: 1, Max: 1) Certificate Signing Request configuration (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--csr_profile))
- `name` (String) User-defined unique name for the profile
- `scep_url` (String) Full SCEP server URL including scheme, host, and path
- `title` (String) Human-readable display title

### Optional

- `ca_cert_pem` (List of String) PEM-encoded trusted CA certificates for SCEP server validation
- `description` (String) Detailed description of the profile purpose
- `secret` (Block List, Max: 1) Write-only secret fields (challenge password) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--secret))
- `use_controller_proxy` (Boolean) If true, SCEP requests are routed through the controller proxy

### Read-Only

- `enterprise_id` (String) Enterprise ID owning this profile
- `id` (String) System-generated unique identifier (UUID)
- `projects_list` (List of Object) Projects referencing this CEP profile (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--projects_list))
- `revision` (List of Object) Object revision information (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--revision))

<a id="nestedblock--csr_profile"></a>
### Nested Schema for `csr_profile`

Required:

- `common_name` (String) Common Name (CN) - typically the device identifier or hostname

Optional:

- `country` (String) Country (C) - two-letter ISO country code
- `hash_algorithm` (String) Hash algorithm used for signing the CSR and SCEP messages
- `key_type` (String) Key type and size for certificate key pair generation
- `locality` (String) Locality (L) - city name
- `organization` (String) Organization (O) - company or entity name
- `organizational_unit` (String) Organizational Unit (OU) - department or division
- `renew_period_percent` (Number) Percentage of certificate validity period after which renewal should be attempted
- `san_email` (List of String) Email addresses for Subject Alternative Name extension
- `san_uri` (List of String) URIs for Subject Alternative Name extension
- `state` (String) State or Province (ST)


<a id="nestedblock--secret"></a>
### Nested Schema for `secret`

Required:

- `challenge_password` (String, Sensitive) Challenge password for SCEP enrollment


<a id="nestedatt--projects_list"></a>
### Nested Schema for `projects_list`

Read-Only:

- `project_id` (String)
- `project_name` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--revision"></a>
### Nested Schema for `revision`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String)
- `created_by` (String)
- `curr` (String)
- `prev` (String)
- `updated_at` (String)
- `updated_by` (String)
